introSection: Space Moon is a steel roller coaster travelling in Brazil with "Yupie Park". It was previously called "Zeppelin". It previously operated at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA under the name Toboggan until 1979.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It has blue track and a space theme.

fullText:
Space Moon is a steel roller coaster travelling in Brazil with "Yupie Park". It was previously called "Zeppelin". It previously operated at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA under the name Toboggan until 1979.

It has blue track and a space theme.


 * A photograph of the roller coaster while it operated at Adventureland
